# Heir of Valandil ◆

> [!tip] 👑 Attachment · Cost: **2** · Leadership

*Title.*

---

Attach to a **_Dúnedain_** hero.
**Planning Action:** Exhaust Heir of Valandil to reduce the cost of the next **_Dúnedain_** ally you play this phase by 1 for each enemy engaged with you.

---

> *"But my home, such as I have, is in the North. For here the heirs of Valandil have ever dwelt in long line unbroken from father unto son for many generations."*
> — Aragorn, The Fellowship of the Ring
